name: l3digitalnet-plugins
description: Curated collection of Claude Code plugins for enhanced development workflows

plugins.name: home-assistant-dev
plugins.description: Comprehensive Home Assistant integration development toolkit with 27 skills, MCP server for live HA connection, automated validation, example integrations, and project templates

plugins.name: github-repo-manager
plugins.description: Conversational GitHub repository maintenance — health auditing, wiki sync, PR triage, issue triage, security posture, dependency auditing, and community file management via PAT

plugins.name: release-pipeline
plugins.description: Interactive release pipeline: context-aware menu for quick merge, full semver release, plugin release, status checks, dry runs, and changelog preview

plugins.name: plugin-test-harness
plugins.description: Iterative live testing framework for Claude Code plugins and MCP servers. Run a session branch, generate tests, record results, apply fixes, and iterate until convergence.

plugins.name: repo-hygiene
plugins.description: Autonomous maintenance sweep for any git repository: validates .gitignore patterns, stale uncommitted changes, Claude Code plugin state, and (in plugin repos) marketplace manifests. Dispatches hygiene-semantic-auditor (Haiku) for README freshness and docs/ accuracy checks.

plugins.name: qt-suite
plugins.description: Qt development and testing toolkit: proactive specialist agents, 16 domain references, scaffolding commands, and headless GUI testing via Qt Pilot MCP for PySide6, PyQt6, and C++/Qt projects.

plugins.name: opus-context
plugins.description: Teaches Claude Code Opus 4.6 to aggressively leverage its 1M token context window. Rules are injected into session context at SessionStart via hook, guaranteeing they are present on every turn.

plugins.name: test-driver
plugins.description: Teaches Claude to proactively drive thorough testing via gap analysis, convergence loops, and persistent status tracking. Framework-agnostic core with stack-specific profiles.

plugins.name: nominal
plugins.description: Structured verification routine for infrastructure changes. Three slash commands enforce a session contract: /preflight validates the environment, /postflight runs 11 verification systems, /abort executes a confirmed rollback.

plugins.name: up-docs
plugins.description: Update documentation across three layers (repo, Outline wiki, Notion) via sub-agent propagation (Haiku) plus drift audit (Sonnet). Five commands for targeted updates and comprehensive drift analysis with four-phase convergence.

plugins.name: handoff
plugins.description: Save and load task context across machines via a shared network drive. Two commands for cross-machine continuity during infrastructure work.

plugins.name: qdev
plugins.description: Development quality toolkit: /research sweeps before you build via qdev-researcher (Sonnet); /quality-review iterates to convergence via qdev-quality-reviewer (Sonnet); /deps-audit checks manifests for CVEs via qdev-deps-auditor (Haiku); /doc-sync keeps inline docs aligned via qdev-doc-syncer (Haiku); /spec-update syncs spec to code.
